name: Amish Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together gently the peaches, sugar, salt, and tapioca in a bowl until well combined.
2. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell.
3. Mix the crumb ingredients (melted butter, flour, cinnamon, and brown sugar) well.
4. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the top of the filling in the pie shell.
5. Bake at 425 degrees F. for 45 to 50 minutes.
